examples: He turned to face her for his parting shot. "You're one coldhearted woman, you know that?"
That was a practical, if coldhearted, calculus in a city like New Orleans.
Hastings' decisions may have seemed coldhearted, but ultimately they were proven correct.
In fact, Ms. Wright's Claire eschews the traditional trophy-wife stereotyping altogether (while wholeheartedly embracing another: that of the coldhearted bitch).
And in the past few months he has seen the curtain of professional sports fully pulled back, in all its coldhearted clarity.
